---
title: "Hannah More. By Charlotte M. Yonge. Eminent Women Series."
---

## Hannah More. By Charlotte M. Yonge. Eminent Women Series.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1888
**Genre:** Non-fiction: biography
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London : W. H. Allen & Co., 13 Waterloo Place, S.W.

### Notes

The <i>Eminent Women </i>series was edited by John H. Ingram.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
